properties.comment: General settings for Datalog test cases
properties.entry: SELECT sum(A) OVER () AS x, a, b FROM r;
SELECT sum(r1.A) OVER () AS y, r2.a from R r1, r r2 WHERE r1.a = r2.a;
SELECT sum(A) OVER (PARTITION BY b ORDER BY a) AS x FROM r;
SELECT sum(A + 2) OVER (PARTITION BY b ORDER BY a) + A AS x FROM r;
SELECT sum(r1.A + 2) OVER () + r2.a AS y, r2.a from R r1, r r2 WHERE r1.a = r2.a;
SELECT sum(r1.A + 2) OVER () + r2.a AS y, r2.a, min(r1.A + r2.A) OVER (PARTITION BY r2.b) AS z FROM R r1, r r2 WHERE r1.a = r2.a;
SELECT maxa, o.* FROM (SELECT r.a, max(r.a) OVER (PARTITION BY r.b) AS maxa FROM r) s, r o WHERE o.a = s.maxa;
